atomic_facts.fact: There are 12 cupcakes arranged in three rows of four.
The cupcakes feature Easter-themed decorations including candy eggs and flowers.
A hand holding a piping bag is visible on the left in the first frame but is absent in the second frame.
The background is a solid dark surface.

atomic_facts.fact: A hand holds a single cupcake in the foreground while several others rest on a surface behind it.
The held cupcake features green frosting resembling grass, purple rosettes, and small pastel-colored egg-shaped candies.
The background cupcakes appear to have similar Easter-themed decorations.
The person holding the cupcake has silver metallic nail polish on their thumb.
